content.en:
After returning to the Star Ancient Giant City, Ye Tian did not go anywhere else, he was still practicing in retreat, using resources to cooperate with the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body, so as to slowly break through the boundary.

"The effect of refining with the Endless Yuan Dao is too fast!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

When he thought about it, he understood.

Before, his Endless Yuan Dao had just started, but now that he had reached the Dacheng realm, the Endless Yuan Dao didn't know how many times stronger than in the past, and the effect of refining was naturally better.

Therefore, if he uses the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body now, and then tempers it with resources, the effect is too good!

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to break the boundary again.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of years of the Origin Domain have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian broke the boundary seventy times.

At the same time, he also perfected several Yuan Dao control techniques such as the Endless Golden Spear to the Small Perfection Realm, and it was very close to the Great Perfection Realm's Yuan Dao Control Technique.

"With my current strength, I should really be invincible in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Canggu Dao Ancestor fought against him again, he would be able to defeat the opponent with a few moves.

It can be said that this visit to the Holy Dao Monument has helped him too much.

If he didn't have this opportunity, if he wanted to have such strength, I am afraid it would take an incomparably long time!

"Although the boundary has been broken seventy times, the resources that can help temper the body have been almost consumed, and it is really difficult to break the eighty-one boundary!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Although he still had many more precious treasures, he couldn't refine his body, and he was of no use to the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

Moreover, the resources of the ordinary tempering body are of little use to him, and he needs very precious resources to do it.

And that kind of resource is too rare, even if it is the Xuanyu Pavilion, there is none!

In other words, he didn't have the right resources to help refine his body now, so he could only rely purely on the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body.

After 70 times, every time the boundary is broken, the time, experience, and resources spent are unimaginable.

Therefore, if he wants to break the boundary of eighty-one times, it is still very difficult.

this day.

Ye Tianlai consulted Xuanhuang Daozu, he was now being cultivated by Xuanyu Pavilion, and Xuanhuang Daozu also attached great importance to him, so he was allowed to come to ask for advice.

Soon, Ye Tian saw Xuanhuang Daozu.

"Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, Dao Ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, in the realm of the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, the more times he breaks the boundary, the more difficult it will be in the later stage, it will be difficult to continue to break the boundary, if you want to quickly break the eighty-one boundary, what resources can you use to assist. I found that the best resources of the Xuanyu Pavilion don't seem to be very helpful!" Ye Tian asked.

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor smiled and said: "Comprehending the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and still wanting to break the eighty-one boundaries, it is indeed very difficult, in fact, many Dao Ancestors who comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao have spent endless years, and in the end they still haven't broken the eighty-one boundaries, especially the last one, which is so difficult that you can't imagine." Among them, about thirty percent of the Dao Ancestors broke the boundary more than seventy times at most, and they couldn't help but attack the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor. After all, if the boundary is broken a few times, it will only affect a small part of the combat effectiveness, and there is no big difference. Only when attacking the Ninefold Origin Ancestor will there be some impact. But the Ninefold Origin Ancestor is too difficult and too difficult, so there is no need to think about this. "

"More than sixty percent of Dao Ancestors, spending endless years, can break the boundary eighty times, and only less than one percent of Dao Ancestors can break the eighty-one limit. "

"Endless Dao Ancestor, it shouldn't be long before you become a half-step sevenfold original ancestor, there's no need to dwell on this, cultivate slowly, break the boundary at the beginning, it's not difficult for a Dao Ancestor like you, and you got so many resources in the No. 13 Ancient Nest last time, it's enough for you to use it for a long time!"

Xuanhuang Daozu didn't know that Ye Tian had broken the boundary seventy times, and thought that Ye Tian had broken the boundary forty-five times, and this inquiry was just a casual question.

At this time, Ye Tiandao: "Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, I have already broken the boundary seventy times!"

As the speaker spoke, the aura on Ye Tian's body emerged.

After Ye Tian didn't hide, Xuanhuang Daozu could see at a glance that Ye Tian had indeed broken the boundary seventy times!

"This ......"

Xuanhuang Daozu was shocked, what kind of speed is this!

He had also known Ye Tian before, Ye Tian had fought in the No. 13 Ancient Nest, and only broke the boundary more than twenty times at that time.

How come it has only been so much time and broken the boundaries so many times!

Even if Ye Tian's resources were sufficient, but now the boundary of at most fifty times is unbelievable, how can he break the boundary of seventy times!

And after reaching the boundary fifty times, every time the boundary is broken, it is very difficult!

Xuanyu Pavilion also has several Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and if they want to break through the boundary of seventy times, it will take many times more time than Ye Tian does not know, and there are also a lot of resources!

Compared with Ye Tianyi, this gap is too big!

Xuanhuang Daozu didn't get to the bottom of it, no matter what secrets Ye Tian had, he wouldn't ask about it.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you have broken the boundary seventy times, ordinary resources are indeed of little use to you, just relying on the Endless Yuan Dao to refine your body, the efficiency is indeed very slow, even if the Yuan Dao realm rises sharply, the help is not too great. At present, there are not many resources that can still help you, and resources that still help you a lot are even rarer!"

Afterwards, Xuanhuang Daozu told Ye Tian about the resources that would help him, and where to obtain them, and gave him detailed instructions.

"Thank you Xuanhuang Daozu for your advice!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor admonished: "Endless Dao Ancestor, some of the places I just told you are very dangerous, and if you are not sure, try not to go. The best way is to use some special treasures to condense the clone, Xuanyu Pavilion also has a Sanqing Dao Fruit, which can help you condense the clone, and you can use some of the resources on your body to exchange for transactions. If you have a doppelganger, your body will not fall. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, he used very precious resources to exchange for the Three Qingdao Fruits.

In fact, he has a copy of the body, and he can't look down on the Three Qingdao Fruits at all.

Although the Sanqing Dao Fruit can be refined into a clone, it can only be refined into a clone, and once it falls, the Sanqing Dao Fruit will be gone.

Moreover, the clones refined by the Sanqing Dao Fruit could only cultivate to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor at most, and they couldn't even become the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

Therefore, for the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, the Sanqing Dao Fruit was of little use.

However, Ye Tian still exchanged the Sanqing Dao Fruit, so that if he copied his body to those places, it would not arouse suspicion, after all, everyone knew that he had a clone.

Therefore, it is still worth spending some price to exchange for the Three Qing Dao Fruits and avoid the suspicion of other Dao Ancestors!

After a while.

Ye Tian was going to go to the Hanhai Wind Belt, which was also the junction between the Hanhai District Boundary and another large regional boundary, and it was also not far from the Xuanyu Pavilion Headquarters.

He went here because there was a resource that helped him so much.
